documentation.description:
@description
This package provide a set of sub-programs to parse and configure environment variable from a file.

Environment variables in file shall have the following format: Key=Value
The value can be single quoted or doubly quoted. If this is the case, they are removed in the result value.
Values that contains "\n" (in string format) are converted to Line Feed if it surronded by double quoted.

subprograms.name: Config
Config_Debug
Config_Interpolate
Config_Overwrite
Equivalent_Key
subprograms.code: function Equivalent_Key (Left, Right : Unbounded_String) return Boolean

subprograms.name: Interpolate
Interpolate_Element
subprograms.code: function Interpolate_Element (Env_Var : Map; Value : String; Overwrite : Boolean) return String

subprograms.name: Parse
subprograms.code: function Parse (File : File_Type; Debug : Boolean := DEFAULT_DEBUG_VALUE) return Map

subprograms.name: Parse
subprograms.code: function Parse (Path : String; Debug : Boolean := DEFAULT_DEBUG_VALUE) return Map

generic_instantiations.name: Environment_Variable_Map
